text: Very slowly, I was waiting 2 hours to get antigen test.

translations.sr: Veoma sporo, čekao sam 2 sata da uradim antigenski test.
translations.sr_cyrl: Веома споро, чекао сам 2 сата да урадим антигенски тест.
translations.en: Very slowly, I was waiting 2 hours to get antigen test.
translations.ru: Очень медленно, я ждал 2 часа, чтобы сделать антигенный тест.
translations.de: Sehr langsam, ich habe 2 Stunden auf meinen Antigen-Test gewartet.
translations.tr: Çok yavaş, antijen testimi yaptırmak için 2 saat bekledim.
